title: Sample Cyber Quest - Introduction to Cybersecurity
description: This is a sample cyber quest demonstrating the JSON structure for importing quest data. You can modify this template to create your own quests.

questions.hint: It's the brain of the computer

questions.text: Complete the sentence: HTML stands for ___ and CSS stands for ___
Complete the Python print statement to display 'Hello World'
questions.hint: Use quotes for strings in Python

questions.text: Arrange these code lines in the correct order to create a simple Python function
Categorize the following items into 'Hardware' or 'Software'
questions.hint: Hardware is physical, software is digital

questions.text: Decode the scrambled word to find a common cybersecurity term
questions.hint: It protects networks from unauthorized access
